name: Resonant Notes
author: Resonant Alpha
description: Opens an Obsidian-compatible markdown vault inside ResonantOS as a native Resonant Notes workspace.

surfaces.label: Vault Bridge
surfaces.description: Select, scan, and preview markdown notes from a user-approved vault.

surfaces.label: Resonant Notes Workspace
surfaces.description: ResonantOS-hosted markdown workspace for operating an Obsidian-compatible vault.

tools.name: obsidian.write_note
tools.description: Write an existing markdown note through the host with stale-save protection, pre-write version snapshot, and audit record.

tools.name: obsidian.vault_index
tools.description: Build a clean-room Obsidian-compatible index of markdown notes, tags, wikilinks, backlinks, and search matches.

notes: Resonant Notes is primarily a user workspace in v1.
Delegated organization proposals must not move or rewrite vault content without user approval.

workflowBoundaries.label: Vault as human workspace
workflowBoundaries.jobToBeDone: Expose an Obsidian-compatible markdown vault as a user-managed knowledge workspace connected to Living Archive intake.
workflowBoundaries.userValue: The human can keep editing notes in a familiar markdown/vault structure while ResonantOS tracks changes for memory intake.
nonGoals: Force Obsidian as a core dependency
Promote vault notes directly into trusted AI Memory pages

skills.name: Vault organization assist
skills.description: Help the human organize markdown notes with tags, wikilinks, and source boundaries while preserving review gates.

connectors.name: Markdown vault
connectors.description: Connects a user-selected markdown or Obsidian vault to ResonantOS through audited filesystem operations.

scripts.name: Vault index preflight
scripts.description: Index markdown notes, tags, wikilinks, and backlinks before organization or intake work.
